title: Infrastructure Ontario and Trillium Health Partners have awarded a fixed-price contract of C$13.9B to ED+PCL Healthcare Partners
content:
## Infrastructure Ontario and Trillium Health Partners have awarded a fixed-price contract of C$13.9B to ED+PCL Healthcare Partners
On July 10, 2025, Infrastructure Ontario (IO) and Trillium Health Partners (THP), in collaboration with the Ontario government, have awarded a C$13.9 billion fixed-price contract to ED+PCL Healthcare Partners in connection with the Trillium Health Partners M-Site Redevelopment P3 DBFM Project . This contract covers the design, construction, financing, and maintenance of The Peter Gilgan Mississauga Hospital and Shah Family Hospital for Women and Children . The project is being executed through a progressive public-private partnership model. The construction is expected to be completed by 2033.
Based in Mississauga, Ontario, The Peter Gilgan Mississauga Hospital and Shah Family Hospital for Women and Children is one of the largest healthcare projects in Canadian history.
McCarthy Tétrault advised Infrastructure Ontario and Trillium Health Partners with a team led by Tristan Musgrave, which included Brad Nicpon, Julie Parla, Godyne Sibay, Ian Mak, Anca Neacsu, James Kelsall, Carrie Fleming, Ailbish Bruchet, Puneet Kohli, Marie Doyle, Meg Heesaker, Byron Shaw, Sam Rogers, Gurvir Sangha, Cynthia MacDougall, Belinda Schubert (Municipal), Robert Glasgow, Keith Rose, Kate McNeill-Keller, Chris Zawadzki, Mehak Suri and Scott Chalmers.
